evals.prompt: Deploy the 'payments' app to prod. During the preflight checks, the Secrets Manager secret 'harumi/payments/prod' does not exist — aws secretsmanager get-secret-value returns a ResourceNotFoundException.
evals.expected_output: Runs the preflight checks, detects that the Secrets Manager secret is missing, reports the failure clearly, and stops before generating any manifests. Provides the exact aws secretsmanager create-secret command the user must run to resolve the blocker.
expectations: Runs aws secretsmanager get-secret-value for the secret path harumi/payments/prod
Detects the ResourceNotFoundException and treats it as a preflight failure
Does NOT generate any Kubernetes manifests or CI workflow files
Reports the missing secret clearly and stops work until it is resolved
Provides the exact aws secretsmanager create-secret command (or equivalent) for the user to create the secret

evals.prompt: Deploy the 'frontend' app to prod. The Secrets Manager secret 'harumi/frontend/prod' exists but when we list its keys with jq 'keys', the output does not include NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY. The app's ExternalSecret references that key.
evals.expected_output: Runs the preflight checks, detects that the required key NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY is absent from the secret, reports the missing key clearly, and stops before generating manifests. Provides the exact aws secretsmanager put-secret-value or update-secret command needed to add the missing key.
expectations: Runs aws secretsmanager get-secret-value and pipes to jq 'keys' to inspect the secret contents
Identifies that NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY is missing from the returned keys
Does NOT generate any Kubernetes manifests or CI workflow files
Reports the missing key as a preflight blocker and stops work
Provides the exact aws secretsmanager command to add NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY to the secret

evals.prompt: Deploy the 'harumi-api' app to prod. During preflight, aws ecr describe-repositories returns a RepositoryNotFoundException for 'harumi-harumi-api'.
evals.expected_output: Runs the preflight checks, detects the missing ECR repository, reports the failure clearly, and stops before generating any manifests. Provides the exact aws ecr create-repository command the user must run to resolve the blocker.
expectations: Runs aws ecr describe-repositories --repository-names harumi-harumi-api
Detects the RepositoryNotFoundException and treats it as a preflight failure
Does NOT generate any Kubernetes manifests or CI workflow files
Reports the missing ECR repository clearly and stops work until it is resolved
Provides the exact aws ecr create-repository command for the user to create the repository

evals.prompt: Deploy the 'frontend' app to prod using the isolated-prod-test rollout shape. The deployment shape is isolated-prod-test, targeting branch 'feature/payments-v2'.
evals.expected_output: Runs Step 2 cluster inspection (argocd app list, kubectl get namespace) and all Step 3 preflight checks before generating any manifests. Only after preflight passes does it generate argocd-app-prod.yaml at the repo root (not argocd-app.yaml) with targetRevision set to the feature branch, .github/workflows/cd-eks-prod.yaml (not cd-eks.yaml), destination.namespace 'frontend-prod-test', and all deploy/ manifests using 'frontend-prod-test' as the namespace.
expectations: Runs argocd app list to check for an existing conflicting ArgoCD application before generating manifests (Step 2)
Runs kubectl get namespace frontend-prod-test to check whether the namespace already exists (Step 2)
Runs aws secretsmanager get-secret-value for the secret path harumi/frontend/prod as a preflight check (Step 3)
Runs aws ecr describe-repositories for the ECR repository as a preflight check (Step 3)
Does NOT generate any manifests until all preflight checks pass
Creates argocd-app-prod.yaml at the repo root, not argocd-app.yaml
Sets targetRevision to 'feature/payments-v2' in argocd-app-prod.yaml
Sets destination.namespace to 'frontend-prod-test' in argocd-app-prod.yaml
Creates .github/workflows/cd-eks-prod.yaml, not cd-eks.yaml
All namespace: fields in deploy/ manifests use 'frontend-prod-test', not 'frontend'
Does NOT modify or overwrite argocd-app.yaml if it already exists
